name: ClickUp
description: Manage ClickUp tasks, lists, docs, and projects through ClickUp's official hosted remote MCP server. Authenticates via OAuth in your browser, no API key or local setup required.

auth.instructions: Authenticates via OAuth 2.1 in your browser using your ClickUp account. ClickUp's MCP server only supports OAuth - API keys and personal access tokens are not accepted. No token setup needed.
